commands.name: append-chat-history
commands.description: Append one validated user/assistant pair into chat-latest.md without reading the file in the caller.

commands.name: append-decision-history
commands.description: Append one validated decision/reason pair into decisions-latest.md without reading the file in the caller.

commands.name: append-metrics-history
commands.description: Append one validated metrics line into metrics-latest.md without reading the file in the caller.

commands.name: rotate-history
commands.description: Rotate non-today sections from *-latest.md into matching *-log.md files, initialize empty latest files, and fail unless latest files end with only today's heading sections.
